entry.title: New IDC N6817121D0028 awarded to S.C.A. - SHIPPING CONSULTANTS ASSOCIATED LTD. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: CONTACT PCO FOR ORDERING PROCEDURES AND NAVSUP ENCLOSURE 15 HUSBANDING SERVICE PROVIDER AND PORT VISIT SUPPORT POLICIES AND PROCEDURES.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: BASIC IDIQ CONTRACT TO PROVIDE HUSBANDING SUPPORT SERVICES FOR PORT VISITS IN REGIONS AWARDED UNDER THIS CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
